description: Routes patients based on income relative to the Federal Poverty Level (FPL). If income < 200% FPL, route to Auto-App for charity care assistance. Otherwise, route to the Debt Cancellation Engine.

metadata.label: Income Verification
metadata.description: Collect and verify the patient's household income and size.

metadata.label: FPL Threshold Check
metadata.description: Determine if income is below 200% of the Federal Poverty Level.

metadata.label: Auto-App Submission
metadata.description: Automatically generate and submit a charity care application on behalf of the patient.

metadata.label: Debt Cancellation Engine
metadata.description: Audit the medical bill for errors, NSA violations, and generate dispute letters.

metadata.label: Counselor Approval
metadata.description: A counselor must approve the application before the case is handed off.

metadata.label: Counselor Review
metadata.description: Hand off the completed case to a human Community Equity Navigator for final review.
